result:
Implementation complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## New files
- **`src/commands/sessions-export.ts`** — The `sessionsExportCommand` function supporting:
  - `--format json|markdown` (default: json)
  - `--output <path>` (write to file instead of stdout)
  - `--session-id <id>` (filter to a single session)
  - `--store`, `--agent`, `--all-agents` (inherited from session store target resolution)
  - Loads session transcripts via `SessionManager` when available
  - JSON output includes `exportedAt`, `count`, and full `sessions` array with metadata + transcript
  - Markdown output renders per-session headers with metadata and conversation entries

- **`src/commands/sessions-export.test.ts`** — 9 unit tests covering JSON/markdown output, file writing, session-id filtering, invalid format rejection, empty stores, and sort order

## Modified files
- **`src/cli/program/register.status-health-sessions.ts`** — Registered the `export` subcommand under `sessionsCmd` with help examples and parent option forwarding
- **`src/cli/program/register.status-health-sessions.test.ts`** — Added 3 registration tests for the export subcommand (option forwarding, parent all-agents, defaults)

## Test results
- All 21 tests pass (12 registration + 9 export)
- Build succeeds with no type errors
- Existing sessions tests (5) remain green
